---
format:
  html:
    mermaid: 
      look: classic
---


```{mermaid}
flowchart TB
    A["Manuscript Draft<br/>Preprint v.0.0"] -->|community feedback| B["Submitted Manuscript<br/>Preprint v.1.0"]
    B -->|journal peer review| C["Revised Manuscript<br/>Preprint v.2.0"]
    C -->|journal acceptance| D["Postprint<br/>Preprint v.3.0"]
    D -->|journal copy-editing and formatting| E["Published Article"]
```
